commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]
commands.repair_reason: - [P1] Needs human/contributor follow-up because the external PR lacks real behavior proof and the security-boundary fix should cover the sibling /json/new path before merge.; Needs attention: The diff hardens one CDP discovery path but leaves a sibling raw CDP response path able to expose an unchecked per-tab WebSocket.; Review finding: [P1] Validate created-tab websocket URLs too — extensions/browser/src/browser/s... (sha=34490497c26ff575d60d0564627e77004da5fff4)
commands.review_summary:
The PR adds CDP endpoint-policy validation for selectable per-tab WebSocket URLs returned by the browser plugin's raw `/json/list` fallback and adds focused fallback-path regression coverage.

PR surface: Source +13, Tests +20. Total +33 across 3 files.

Reproducibility: yes. at source level: a raw `/json/new` response can return `webSocketDebuggerUrl: ws://169.254.169.254/...`, and current `openTab()` would normalize and expose it as `BrowserTab.wsUrl` without `assertCdpEndpointAllowed()`. I did not run tests because this review was read-only.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] Needs human/contributor follow-up because the external PR lacks real behavior proof and the security-boundary fix should cover the sibling `/json/new` path before merge.

target.title: fix(browser): validate discovered CDP websocket URLs
target.body:
## Summary

Fixes the browser remote CDP raw `/json/list` fallback so discovered per-tab WebSocket endpoints are checked against the existing CDP endpoint policy before being returned to downstream tab consumers.

## Changes

- Validate each selectable normalized discovered `webSocketDebuggerUrl` with `assertCdpEndpointAllowed()` before returning `tab.wsUrl`.
- Keep browser-internal target filtering before endpoint validation so non-selectable targets remain ignored.
- Add regression coverage for strict CDP policy rejecting a blocked discovered WebSocket endpoint.
- Update fallback test fixtures to use the harness-approved remote CDP host instead of a DNS-only example host.

## Validation

- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs run extensions/browser/src/browser/server-context.remote-profile-tab-ops.fallback.test.ts`
- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs run extensions/browser/src/browser/server-context.remote-profile-tab-ops.fallback.test.ts extensions/browser/src/browser/cdp.helpers.internal.test.ts extensions/browser/src/browser/chrome.loopback-ssrf.integration.test.ts`
- `git diff --check`
- `.agents/skills/autoreview/scripts/autoreview --mode local`

## Notes

- AI-assisted change.
- `CHANGELOG.md` was not updated.
- `USER.md` worklog was appended locally and intentionally left out of the commit.
- Real behavior proof: targeted browser-extension regression tests exercise the affected remote CDP fallback path through the repo test harness; no live remote browser provider was used.
target.author: eleqtrizit
